name: che-keychain
description: Trust-isolated macOS keychain credential prompt. Native NSAlert renders inside a signed binary's own process — caller (LLM / MCP / script) never sees the typed value. Wrapper auto-downloads CheKeychain binary from PsychQuant/che-keychain GitHub Release to ~/bin/che-keychain so consumers (CheTransportMCP --setup, etc.) can find it via PATH.
